title: stephanomeria cichoriacea
intro: Stephanomeria cichoriacea, also known as the western wiry-leaf, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Stephanomeria cichoriacea include treating wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues, as well as providing relief from fever and rheumatism. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are often used to promote healing and reduce inflammation.
